Contact us
Clinical-research smart-bedding platform · In development

We measure nocturnal scratching as it happens, and cool the skin in response.

Histo-Cooling is a single sealed device. It watches for scratching during sleep, cools the skin when scratching starts, and keeps a clinical-grade record of every episode. We built it for research into atopic dermatitis, chronic urticaria, and similar conditions where night-time itch carries the burden.

Explore the technology Partner & invest
01The Problem

The most important endpoint nobody can measure

Nocturnal itch is the core burden marker in dermatology, yet it is still scored from next-morning recall.

Subjective

UAS7 / SCORAD / NRS all rely on morning recall, which systematically underestimates night events.

Resolution

Multiple episodes in one night blur together, with no timing, duration, or distribution.

No intervention

Actigraphy captures scratching only indirectly, and only records it. Nothing acts on it.

Compliance

Diary compliance collapses after week four, leaving gaps in the longitudinal data.

02Our Solution

One sealed device closes the whole loop

Detect, respond, record, and adapt, all inside one fan-less, pump-less, disinfectant-wipeable IP68 device.

01 · DETECT

Detect scratch

IMU, sleep state machine, and frequency-domain analysis identify valid scratch episodes.

→
02 · RESPOND

Active cooling

Cools the surface to break the itch-scratch cycle, bounded by a hard-coded safety envelope.

→
03 · RECORD

Signed data

Cryptographically signed time-series mapped to SCORAD / UAS7 / NRS endpoints.

→
04 · ADAPT

Efficacy feedback

Adjusts intensity by whether the response worked, clamped to the safety envelope.

↻ A continuous closed loop, accumulating a multi-night dataset
03Core Technology

Three interlocking layers

A · Method

Closed-loop method

Sleep state machine, frequency-domain scratch detection, a closed-loop response sequence, and event-to-endpoint mapping.

B · Hardware

Hermetic cooling

Thermoelectric cooling, a liquid-metal thermal bus, and a PCM buffer; no fan, no pump; IP68, disinfectable.

C · Data & safety

Trustworthy data

Hard-coded safety envelope, sham mode for double-blinding, device signing, offline export, and fault-tolerant storage.

See the full technology
04Impact

From patients to the world

PATIENTS

Sleep & quality of life

Objectively quantify nocturnal scratching, and cool the skin as it flares.

INDUSTRY

Objective endpoint

An objective endpoint for biologics R&D, and import substitution for trial instruments.

NATION

Sovereignty & voice

A locally controlled high-end device that raises Chinese research credibility.

WORLD

Global health

An objective, reproducible nocturnal endpoint for global itch research, offered as an open standard.

05Roadmap

From patents to clearance

Now

Phase 0

6+ layered filings in place; spec frozen.

0–12 mo

Phase 1

Prototype; bench validation; security hardening; NMPA pre-submission.

12–24 mo

Phase 2

Single-center pilot; reference-cohort calibration; pharma/CRO LOIs.

24–36 mo

Phase 3

NMPA Class II; FDA De Novo prep; initial trial deployment.

Let us turn it from filings into a prototype

We are raising seed funding and seeking R&D, clinical, and pharma partnerships. Incubators, investors, dermatology research centers, and biologics sponsors welcome.
